hybrid_keyword_weight.rationale: Keyword weight 0.5 ensures exact term matches dominate search results.

hybrid_vector_weight.rationale: Vector weight 0.3 balances semantic similarity with keyword precision.

hybrid_graph_weight.rationale: Graph weight 0.2 adds structural context without overwhelming results.

hybrid_top_k.rationale: Top-10 results is the optimal balance for user consumption.

integrated_search_top_k.rationale: Top-5 memory results prevents noise in integrated search.

graphrag_hops.rationale: 2-hop graph expansion balances context breadth and relevance.
